title: The Matrix
description: A hacker discovers reality is a simulation and joins a rebellion against intelligent machines.

title: Inception
description: A skilled thief enters dreams to steal secrets and attempts one final mission involving idea implantation.

title: Interstellar
description: A team travels through a wormhole to find a new home for humanity as Earth becomes uninhabitable.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind who creates chaos in Gotham City.

title: Black Panther
description: A new king of Wakanda must defend his nation and identity from a powerful challenger.

title: Spider-Man Into the Spider-Verse
description: A teenager becomes Spider-Man and joins heroes from different dimensions to save the multiverse.

title: Toy Story
description: A cowboy doll feels threatened when a new space ranger toy becomes the child's favorite.

title: Finding Nemo
description: A clownfish crosses the ocean to rescue his son with help from a forgetful friend.

title: Coco
description: A young musician enters the Land of the Dead and learns about family, memory, and identity.

title: The Lion King
description: A young lion prince must accept his responsibility and reclaim his place as king.

title: The Social Network
description: A college student creates a social networking platform that changes technology and friendship.

title: Moneyball
description: A baseball manager uses data analytics to build a competitive team with limited resources.

title: The Big Short
description: Investors discover weaknesses in the housing market before the financial crisis.

title: Hidden Figures
description: Three Black women mathematicians at NASA make critical contributions to the space program.

title: The Imitation Game
description: A mathematician helps break wartime codes while facing personal and social challenges.

title: La La Land
description: An aspiring actress and a jazz musician pursue dreams and love in Los Angeles.

title: The Notebook
description: A couple's lifelong love story is challenged by class differences and time.

title: Crazy Rich Asians
description: A professor discovers her boyfriend belongs to one of the wealthiest families in Singapore.

title: The Proposal
description: A demanding editor convinces her assistant to marry her to avoid deportation.

title: Knives Out
description: A detective investigates the suspicious death of a wealthy crime novelist.

title: Gone Girl
description: A woman's disappearance turns into a dark examination of marriage, media, and deception.

title: Parasite
description: A poor family infiltrates a wealthy household, exposing class tension and hidden danger.

title: Get Out
description: A young man uncovers disturbing secrets during a visit to his girlfriend's family.

title: A Quiet Place
description: A family must live in silence to survive creatures that hunt by sound.

title: The Conjuring
description: Paranormal investigators help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse.
